Md Jewel Rana

Senior Laravel Backend & Full-Stack Developer

Dhaka, Bangladesh · Remote worldwide
jewelrana.dev@gmail.com · +880 1776-273545
LinkedIn · GitHub · Portfolio

Professional Profile

Backend-focused Laravel and Node.js full-stack software engineer with 8+ years of professional experience designing and delivering scalable web platforms, payment systems, inventory workflows, real-time applications, and third-party API integrations.

Experienced in distributed remote collaboration, technical ownership, mentoring, production incident handling, and delivery from requirements through deployment.

Core Competencies

BackendPHP, Laravel, CodeIgniter, CakePHP, Node.js, Express, REST APIs, WordPress
FrontendJavaScript, Vue.js, jQuery, Livewire, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
Data & CachingMySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Memcached, Firebase
Integrations & DomainsPayment gateways, Wallet systems, Inventory & distribution, CRM workflows, MikroTik / ISP billing, SMS & push notifications, Third-party API design
DevOps & ToolingDocker / docker-compose, Nginx, Apache, Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS), macOS, Jenkins, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Git, AI-assisted development

Professional Experience

Software Engineer · Newroz Technologies Limited

2021 – Present

Dhaka, Bangladesh · Laravel, PHP, MySQL, Redis, REST APIs, Vue.js

  • Owned backend delivery for Kartat card-selling products, including inventory, gateway, reseller panels, FIB Bank of Iraq reseller flows, and activity-log management.
  • Contributed to FastPay wallet initiatives for Iraq across inventory, corporate, distribution, CRM, and operational logging modules.
  • Handled production-critical incidents and high-pressure releases across payment, card-selling, stock, and partner-integration workflows while protecting transaction and inventory integrity.
  • Designed and integrated third-party APIs for payments, stock, and partner systems using Laravel.

Software Engineer · Jolzatra Limited

2020 – 2021

Dhaka, Bangladesh · Laravel, PHP, MySQL, Vue.js, REST APIs

  • Built and maintained Laravel backend services powering merchant operations and booking workflows.
  • Collaborated with product and management stakeholders on requirements, estimation, and delivery planning.
  • Improved scalability and maintainability of booking-related backend features.

Selected Impact

  • 8+ years shipping production backend systems across fintech, booking, ISP, and enterprise domains
  • Built the complete Kartat card-selling platform end-to-end (inventory, gateway, reseller, bank flows)
  • Delivered FastPay wallet product modules for Iraq including inventory, corporate, distribution, CRM, and activity logging
  • Experienced mentoring developers, estimating delivery, and owning features from requirements to production

Selected Projects

Durpalla Booking Platform Ecosystem

Ongoing case study

Building an end-to-end booking platform ecosystem that connects a Laravel/PHP API gateway with a Flutter customer application and the services required for complete booking journeys.

Laravel, PHP, REST APIs, Flutter, Dart, MySQL

Kartat Card-Selling Platform

Case study

End-to-end card-selling application covering inventory management, payment gateway operations, reseller panels, bank partnership flows (including FIB Bank of Iraq), and activity logging.

Laravel, MySQL, REST APIs, Inventory systems

FastPay Wallet (Iraq)

Case study

Wallet and operational panels for FastPay initiatives serving Iraq, including inventory, corporate, distribution, CRM, and activity-log management systems.

Laravel, MySQL, API integrations, CRM
